giant-cookies.main > section:nth-of-type(2) > div > p:: Send us your personal message and we'll stamp it in the centre. Each cookie comes boxed. Gluten-free, diary free and vegan options available.

handmade-biscuits.main > section:nth-of-type(2) > div > di:
Vanilla is our standard flavour; for Christmas we bake them with mild mixed spice. 
Gluten free, diary fee and vegan allergens catered for. 
 Don't miss our giant cookies, too.

Min order 10 units, prices start from £3 each
